description: Two highest-impact accuracy bugs from the project_fitting_modifier_gaps audit: (1) Sacrilege-class modifierInfo entries don't apply correctly (SDE modifierInfo unreliability — known issue requires explicit mapping). (2) `_apply_ship_hull_bonuses` is missing the branch that handles "bonus to ship's own resists" traits — affects Drake, HACs, command ships. Fix both, regression-test against Pyfa for Drake, Sacrilege, Damnation, Eagle.
title: Fitting: Sacrilege modifierInfo + ship-to-self hull resist bonuses
